title: Sweet Velvety Self-Raising Flour Stir-fry
description: This low-sodium-friendly brunch dish features a velvety sauce made from self-raising flour, ideal for creating a sweet and creamy consistency.

ingredients.name: 1 cup self-raising flour
ingredients.notes: For low sodium, opt for a gluten-free option if needed.

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine self-raising flour and water. Stir to dissolve the flour into the heated water.
Add salt (to taste), unsweetened condensed milk, diced tomatoes, onion, and garlic. Stir until the mixture thickens.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Pour the flour mixture into the skillet with the onions and stir to coat evenly. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a side dish or alongside eggs.
